title: DE-LU Electricity Market 2019–2025
subtitle: Hourly DE-LU power market data 2019-2025, 75 features from 10 sources
description:
Comprehensive hourly dataset for the DE-LU (Germany/Luxembourg) bidding zone covering 2019–2025 (61,369 rows, 75 columns). Joins 10 data sources: ENTSO-E day-ahead prices, actual generation per type, total load (actual + forecast), wind/solar day-ahead forecasts, day-ahead prices for 9 neighbouring zones (FR, NL, AT, PL, CZ, DK_1, DK_2, BE, SE_4), cross-border physical flows, day-ahead NTC, EU ETS carbon price proxy (CARB.L via Yahoo Finance), TTF/NG gas price proxy (Yahoo Finance), and ERA5 reanalysis weather data (Open-Meteo). All timestamps are UTC. All column names carry unit suffixes (_mw, _eur_mwh, _degc, _pct, _kmh, _wm2, _mm, _usd). Intended for day-ahead electricity price forecasting, renewable energy analysis, and energy market EDA.

Sources:
- ENTSO-E Transparency Platform (https://transparency.entsoe.eu) — CC BY 4.0
- Open-Meteo Archive API / ERA5 reanalysis (https://open-meteo.com) — CC BY 4.0
- Yahoo Finance (https://finance.yahoo.com) — CARB.L and TTF=F/NG=F proxies

resources.description: Hourly DE-LU electricity market dataset — primary file (Parquet, recommended)
